'''kasaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbiteye|rabbiteye]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-s-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbiteye|rabbiteye]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kasaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæsæyæth|kæsæyæth]] || [[word:kæsæyæj|kæsæyæj]] || [[word:kæsæyæsh|kæsæyæsh]] || [[word:kæsæyæ|kæsæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kasasayath|kasasayath]] || [[word:kasasayaj|kasasayaj]] || [[word:kasasayash|kasasayash]] || [[word:kasasaya|kasasaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kasayath|kasayath]] || [[word:kasayaj|kasayaj]] || [[word:kasayash|kasayash]] || [[word:kasaya|kasaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kasafyath|kasafyath]] || [[word:kasafyaj|kasafyaj]] || [[word:kasafyash|kasafyash]] || [[word:kasafyaf|kasafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kasayatha|kasayatha]] || [[word:kasayaja|kasayaja]] || [[word:kasayasha|kasayasha]] || [[word:kasayaka|kasayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kasayath|kasayath]] || [[word:kasayaj|kasayaj]] || [[word:kasayash|kasayash]] || [[word:kasaya|kasaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kasayathal|kasayathal]] || [[word:kasayajal|kasayajal]] || [[word:kasayashal|kasayashal]] || [[word:kasayakal|kasayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kasayathatha|kasayathatha]] || [[word:kasayajaja|kasayajaja]] || [[word:kasayashasha|kasayashasha]] || [[word:kasayaka|kasayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kasayathan|kasayathan]] || [[word:kasayajan|kasayajan]] || [[word:kasayashan|kasayashan]] || [[word:kasayakan|kasayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kasayathaoro|kasayathaoro]] || [[word:kasayajaoro|kasayajaoro]] || [[word:kasayashaoro|kasayashaoro]] || [[word:kasayakaoro|kasayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
